title: elymus durus
intro: Elymus durus, also known as the hard-grass or wood-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elymus durus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems like diarrhea and ulcers. Elymus durus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
